property.name: dfs.namenode.name.dir
property.description: Determines where on the local filesystem the DFS namenode should store the fsimage file.

property.name: dfs.datanode.data.dir
property.description: Determines where datanode should store its blocks.

property.name: dfs.blocksize
property.description: The default block size for new files.

property.name: dfs.namenode.http-address
property.description: The address and the base port where the dfs namenode web ui will listen on.

property.name: dfs.datanode.http.address
property.description: The address where the datanode web ui will listen on.

property.name: dfs.secondary.namenode.http-address
property.description: The address where the secondary namenode web ui will listen on.

property.name: dfs.namenode.rpc-address
property.description: The RPC address for the NameNode
